name: like-you
description: Bootstrap a ~/Business/.claude/ workspace from your Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, and Sheets in 15 minutes. Generates a memory graph (/context), 5-10 business-specific skills split into content and judgment, a voice.md distilled from 50 of your real sent emails, and an automations.md spec for proactive triggers. Local-file fallback when MCPs are missing.
